communityguidelinesheader.help_us_keep_gallevr_a_safe_and_welcomin: Help keep {appName} a safe and welcoming space

communityguidelinespage.content_depicting_illegal_acts_extreme_v: Content depicting illegal acts, extreme violence, or self-harm is not allowed and will be reported to authorities if necessary.
communityguidelinespage.dont_pretend_to_be_other_users_vrchat_st: Don't pretend to be other users, {platformName} staff, or the {appName} developer.
communityguidelinespage.explicit_content_is_not_allowed_to_be_po: Explicit content is NOT allowed to be posted onto the feed or posted in public galleries.
communityguidelinespage.explicitly_pornographic_or_illegal_conte: Explicitly pornographic or illegal content is strictly prohibited.
communityguidelinespage.gallevr_was_built_to_celebrate_the_creat: {appName} was built to celebrate the creativity and community of {platformName} photographers. These guidelines are designed to ensure that every user feels safe, respected, and inspired when sharing their virtual moments.
communityguidelinespage.if_a_world_creator_or_avatar_artist_asks: If a world creator or avatar artist asks for their work not to be featured in a certain way, please respect their wishes.
communityguidelinespage.if_you_encounter_content_or_behavior_tha: If you encounter content or behavior that violates these guidelines, please use the report feature on the photo/profile or contact the moderation team directly.
communityguidelinespage.never_share_private_reallife_information: Never share private real-life information about other users without their explicit consent.
communityguidelinespage.only_upload_photos_that_you_have_taken_o: Only upload photos that you have taken or have permission to share.
communityguidelinespage.treat_others_with_respect_harassment_bul: Treat others with respect. Harassment, bullying, and hate speech have no place here.
communityguidelinespage.violations_of_these_guidelines_may_resul: Violations of these guidelines may result in:
communityguidelinespage.we_reserve_the_right_to_determine_what_c: The moderation team reserves the right to determine what constitutes a violation and take action accordingly.
communityguidelinespage.while_artistic_nudity_or_suggestive_avat: While artistic nudity or suggestive avatars are common in VR, please use discretion and keep such content strictly in private galleries.
communityguidelinespage.you_are_responsible_for_the_content_you_: You are responsible for the content you upload. All photos must adhere to the following:

connectweb.button_youll_be_automatically_signed_in_: button. You'll be automatically signed in here.
connectweb.code_expiration_info: Enter this in the {appName} app to pair instantly. (Expires in 10 min)

connectweb.pair_instruction: Enter this code in the {appName} Desktop App to link it to this account.
connectweb.the_final_step_is_to_connect_the_app_to_: The final step is to connect the app to the website. Welcome to {appName}!

creditspage.camera_has_been_instrumental_in_gallevrs: Camera has been instrumental in {appName}'s development, extensively testing new features across {os}, Web and {device} platforms. His feedback and UI concepts have directly shaped the app's design and functionality, making the experience more intuitive and user-friendly.
creditspage.im_in_charge_of_everything_at_gallevr_it: I'm in charge of everything at {appName}. It started as a small script out of personal necessity, then grew into something I'm excited to share with the world. I knew I had to make {appName}, and I had to make it right.
creditspage.im_incredibly_grateful_to_misname_for_de: I'm incredibly grateful to misname for designing the {appName} logo and providing valuable design pointers throughout the project. Her creative talent improved {appName}'s visual identity and helped make it more polished and professional.
creditspage.intro_paragraph: Hi there, I'm {name}! {appName} is a passion project I've been working on solo for almost {years} years . It's developed from scratch purely out of love for the VR community.
creditspage.thanks_to_those_who_made_this_possible: Thanks to those who made this possible.
creditspage.your_support_and_feedback_mean_the_world: Your support and feedback mean the world to me

landinghero.free_unlimited_and_built_with_love: Build a clean gallery of your memories, instantly found, easily shared.
landinghero.gallevr_is_a_social_platform_for_your_vr: Tired of digging through messy local folders?

landingjourney.it_all_started_when_i_wanted_a_simple_wa: I made {appName} because it was inconvenient to find and share my photos. The file explorer would stop responding, and I wanted a home for my photos that was private, but easy to share.
landingjourney.that_script_worked_but_it_had_me_thinkin: {appName} automatically tags your photos with the world and the players in it so you can find any photo with ease. Instead of digging through your folders, you get a clean gallery of your memories, and a feed with the photos your friends are sharing.
landingjourney.the_path_that_turned_one_idea_into_galle: The path that turned one idea into {appName}.
landingjourney.well_im_just_getting_started_gallevr_is_: Well, I'm just getting started... {appName} is a passion project that needs people using it in order to thrive. Your participation, feedback, and support will shape it into the best place to share in VR!

isamu.quote: Literally one of the best ways to manage my library. I've never had anything else come close to the ease of use this app has for all my photos.

ray.quote: Very easy and convenient way to organize my {platformName} photos. The most surprising thing for me is that {appName} is able to tell who was in the world at the time of the photo.

supportpage.external_cloud_services_everything_is_ho: external cloud services. Everything is hosted in-house and built by me. A huge shoutout to my friend
supportpage.failed_to_start_checkout: Failed to start checkout. Are you logged in?
supportpage.for_providing_the_hosting_that_makes_thi: for providing the hosting that makes this all possible.
supportpage.gallevr_is_a_passion_project_ive_been_wo: {appName} is a passion project I've been working on solo for almost
supportpage.intro_paragraph_1: Hi there, I'm {name} ! {appName} is a passion project I've been working on solo for almost {years} years . It's developed from scratch purely out of love for the VR community.
supportpage.intro_paragraph_2: I've spent a long time figuring out how to keep this service free and unlimited for everyone across {windows}, {linux}, {quest}, and {pico} .
supportpage.intro_paragraph_3: To keep your data private, I don't use {any} external cloud services. Everything is hosted in-house and built by me. A huge shoutout to my friend {venrey} for providing the hosting that makes this all possible.
supportpage.its_developed_from_scratch_purely_out_of: . It's developed from scratch purely out of love for the VR community.
supportpage.ive_spent_a_long_time_figuring_out_how_t: I've spent a long time figuring out how to keep this service free and unlimited for everyone across
supportpage.support_is_never_required_but_it_means_e: Support is never required, but it means everything to keep {appName} alive. I've spent countless nights researching the proper way to build things rather than taking shortcuts, because I believe this community deserves tools that are built to last.
supportpage.supporting_development_of_new_communityf: Supporting development of new community-focused VR features.

aboutpage.title: About GalleVR
aboutpage.subtitle: Free, unlimited, and open source. Built with 💜 for the VRChat community.
aboutpage.story_p1: I made GalleVR because it was inconvenient to find and share my photos. The file explorer would stop responding, and I wanted a home for my photos that was private, but easy to share. GalleVR automatically tags your photos with the world and the players in it so you can find any photo with ease.
aboutpage.story_p2: So I built a place where you can just put everything. Instead of digging through your folders, you get a clean gallery of your memories, and a feed with the photos your friends are sharing. It's unlimited, free storage that's built with VR, and the people in it, in mind.
aboutpage.features_title: It does more than just that, though.

autotagging.title: Trace your steps
autotagging.desc: I wanted to remember the journey, so the app automatically tracks the worlds for every shot. You'll never lose that photo in Amber Glade, or any world, again.

storage.title: A project you can trust
storage.desc: Most importantly, I wanted to own my data. You own your photos. GalleVR is open source, and relies on no-one for external storage. I believe your memories shouldn't be a product for anyone else.

feed.title: A place to put everything
feed.desc: Instead of digging through your folders, you get a clean gallery of your memories, and a feed with the photos your friends are sharing.

alerts.title: Find your friends (and yourself)
alerts.desc: I was tired of missing the photos that other people took, so I made a notification system that lets you know whenever someone posts a photo with you in it.

faq.what_is_gallevr_a: GalleVR is an open-source, private-by-default photo gallery and social feed built for VRChat screenshots. It automatically parses local logs to tag your photos with worlds and players, making your VR photo library instantly searchable.
faq.is_it_free_a: Yes! GalleVR is free and has unlimited storage for VRChat screenshots. I offer optional supporter subscriptions to help cover hosting and server costs.
faq.how_sync_works_a: You run the lightweight GalleVR companion app (built with Flutter for Windows, Linux, Meta Quest, and Pico). The companion app runs in the background, watches your VRChat screenshots folder, compresses images to WebP format, parses your local VRChat output logs (output_log_*.txt) to match photo timestamps with player/world entries, and uploads them securely to a self-hosted SeaweedFS storage cluster.
faq.privacy_q_desc: Yes. Every photo you upload is private by default. You choose exactly what to make public, post to the community feed, or show on your profile.
faq.login_q: Do I need to enter my VRChat credentials?
faq.login_q_desc: No. If you sign up on the web or choose manual verification in the app, no credentials are required, and verification is done using your VRChat status.

aboutpage.cta_title: Ready to organize your VRChat memories?
aboutpage.cta_desc: Set up GalleVR in just a few minutes. Sync your screenshots, find your friends, and start organizing your memories today.
aboutpage.video_desc: Take a quick walkthrough tour to see how automatically tagging, syncing, and organizing VRChat screenshots works.
